description: Style NoteSpun from our irresistibly soft cotton, this is a blissfully cosy T-shirt. Sporting print on the chest, this tee from myntra gives a fresh twist to an off-duty staple making it ideal for your cool summer uniform. Style it with capris or shorts, understated accessories and lace up casual shoes for perfect woman-about-town nonchalance.Product DetailsCream round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves and print on the chestMaterial and Care100% cottonWash in cold water wash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, do not soak, do not wringWarm iron, iron print on reverseSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
